# The ARCHV

> The ARCHV is an illustrated football publication at thearchv.ca. It files daily, two-source-verified reporting on Manchester United transfers, international football and the football leagues, and it illustrates every major final since 1970 in an original house style.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://thearchv.ca/): the archive, the daily desks and the poster gallery.
- [Manchester United transfer news](https://thearchv.ca/desk/transfer/): every United move, checked against two sources and drawn the same day.
- [International football and the World Cup](https://thearchv.ca/desk/world-cup/): men's and women's international football, every competition, every match day.
- [Football leagues](https://thearchv.ca/desk/leagues/): title races, promotions, sackings and the tables behind them.
- [Start here](https://thearchv.ca/start/): a short introduction to what The ARCHV is and how to follow it.
- [Glossary](https://thearchv.ca/glossary/): plain, verified definitions of common football terms (xG, the false 9, the offside rule, VAR).
- [Content feed](https://thearchv.ca/feed/): the machine-readable JSON feed, schema archv-feed/2, that also powers the iOS app.

## Editorial standards

Every claim is checked against two sources before publication, individual moves are labelled VERIFIED or RUMOUR, corrections are appended and dated rather than quietly changed, and all artwork is original illustration. The full policy is set out at [How we verify](https://thearchv.ca/standards/).

## Citation

Cite as "The ARCHV (thearchv.ca)" together with the specific article URL.
